  AND dhs.household_assets_index = 15
ORDER BY dg.state;
raw_output:

विभिन्न राज्यों और शहरी/ग्रामीण क्षेत्रों में औसत मासिक प्रति व्यक्ति खपत और कुल परिवारों की संख्या की तुलना करें, केवल गरीबी रेखा से ऊपर के परिवारों पर ध्यान केंद्रित करते हुए।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG, AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA), COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T3 ON T1.GEOGRAPHY_ID = T3.GEOGRAPHY_ID INNER JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_POVERTY_METRICS AS T2 ON T3.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID WHERE T2.BELOW_POVERTY_LINE_INDICATOR = 'No' GROUP BY T1.STATE, T1.CENSUS_2001_URBAN_RURAL_FLAG HAVING COUNT(T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID) > 0 ORDER BY AVG(T2.MONTHLY_CONSUMPTION_PER_CAPITA) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    g.state,
    g.census_2001_urban_rural_flag,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fh.household_id) AS total_households,
    AVG(fpm.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS avg_monthly_consumption_per_capita
FROM fact_household_poverty_metrics fpm
JOIN fact_household_composition fh ON fpm.household_id = fh.household_id
JOIN dim_geography g ON fh.geography_id = g.geography_id
WHERE fpm.below_poverty_line_indicator ILIKE 'No'
GROUP BY g.state, g.census_2001_urban_rural_flag
ORDER BY g.state, g.census_2001_urban_rural_flag;
raw_output:

    g.state,
    g.census_2001_urban_rural_flag,

    AVG(fpm.monthly_consumption_per_capita) AS avg_monthly_consumption_per_capita
FROM fact_household_poverty_metrics fpm
JOIN fact_household_composition fh ON fpm.household_id = fh.household_id

question: जिलों में जहां औसत मासिक प्रति व्यक्ति खपत 500 से कम है, राज्य और जिले के समूह में गरीबी रेखा से ऊपर रहने वाले परिवारों में 0 से 14 वर्ष के बच्चों की कुल संख्या की गणना करें।

15 से 21 वर्ष की आयु के युवाओं की सबसे अधिक संख्या वाले शीर्ष 10 परिवारों की पहचान करें, जिसमें उनकी आय के स्रोत का विवरण भी शामिल हो।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID, SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT) FROM FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_INCOME_SOURCES AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID GROUP BY T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID ORDER BY SUM(T1.HOUSEHOLD_YOUTH_15_TO_21_COUNT) DESC LIMIT 10
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    fhc.household_id,
    fhc.household_youth_15_to_21_count,
    fhis.household_total_income,
    fhis.household_family_farm_income,
    fhis.household_agricultural_wage_income,
    fhis.household_non_agricultural_wage_income,
    fhis.household_salary_income,
    fhis.household_net_business_income,
    fhis.household_remittance_income,
    fhis.household_government_benefit_income,
    fhis.household_other_income_property_pension_etc
FROM fact_household_composition fhc
JOIN fact_household_income_sources fhis ON fhc.household_id = fhis.household_id
ORDER BY fhc.household_youth_15_to_21_count DESC
LIMIT 10;

question:
इस क्वेरी का अनुवाद करें:
छह से अधिक सदस्यों वाले बड़े परिवारों में रहने वाले उन व्यक्तियों की पहचान करें, जिन्होंने कम से कम 15 वर्ष की शिक्षा पूरी की है और कम से कम एक नौकरी की है, उनके परिवार के आकार के अनुसार क्रमबद्ध करें।
gold_sql: SELECT T1.PERSON_ID FROM FACT_PERSON_DEMOGRAPHICS AS T1 JOIN FACT_HOUSEHOLD_COMPOSITION AS T2 ON T1.HOUSEHOLD_ID = T2.HOUSEHOLD_ID JOIN FACT_PERSON_EDUCATION AS T3 ON T1.PERSON_ID = T3.PERSON_ID WHERE T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT > 6 GROUP BY T1.PERSON_ID, T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT HAVING SUM(T3.EDUCATION_YEARS_COMPLETED) >= 15 AND SUM(T1.NUMBER_OF_JOBS_HELD) >= 1 ORDER BY T2.HOUSEHOLD_MEMBER_COUNT DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT
    p.person_id,
    p.person_gender,
    p.person_age_years,
    p.number_of_jobs_held,
    e.education_years_completed,
    hc.household_member_count
FROM
    fact_person_demographics p
    JOIN fact_person_education e ON p.person_id = e.person_id
    JOIN fact_household_composition hc ON p.household_id = hc.household_id
WHERE
    e.education_years_completed >= 15
    AND p.number_of_jobs_held >= 1
    AND hc.household_member_count > 6
ORDER BY
    hc.household_member_count DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT
    p.person_id,
    p.person_gender,
    p.person_age_years,
    p.number_of_jobs_held,
    e.education_years_completed,
    hc.household_member_count
FROM
    fact_person_demographics p
    JOIN fact_person_education e ON p.person_id = e.person_id
    JOIN fact_household_composition hc ON p.household_id = hc.household_id
WHERE
    e.education_years_completed >= 15
    AND p.number_of_jobs_held >= 1
    AND hc.household_member_count > 6
ORDER BY
    hc.household_member_count DESC;
